training_status: active gym and cardio, recently decreased

benefits.description: Weight loss averaging 1.7 lbs/week, down from 247 lbs to 228 lbs

side_effects.description: Increased lightheadedness and vertigo, woke up with room spinning intensely after rolling over in bed
Increased irritability and feeling 'not great' while eating
Aware of potential GI related side effects

protocol_notes: 2.5 mg Tirzepatide for 4 weeks. Caloric intake 1800-2100 calories daily, 120g carbs, 50-60g fat, approximately 1 gallon water per day. Estimated expenditure ~2500 calories at starting weight of 247 lbs. Introduced electrolytes. Started weight 247 lbs, current 228 lbs (19 lb loss over 4 weeks). Gym and cardio activity decreased significantly during protocol. User reports BP usually normal.
